'''''Malice''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
When [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces detected a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] carrying a high ranking officer which was undergoing mid-space repairs to its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the ''Malice'' was diverted from its mission to destroy the shuttle. The ''Malice'' exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and launched a single [[Squadron/Legends|squadron's]] worth of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] before returning to its original mission. The Imperial fighters were engaged by three defending Rebel fighters, a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] and an [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] who, despite being outnumbered, were able to stop the Imperial attack and save the shuttle. By the time the ''Malice'' returned the Rebels had left the area.

The Alliance later recreated the mission as a simulation for training new pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
